---
title: "CV | Chuan (River) Zhu"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
description: "Curriculum vitae for Chuan (River) Zhu, a PhD researcher studying AI, generative AI, service operations, platform operations, and empirical operations management."
author: "Chuan (River) Zhu"
keywords:
  - academic CV
  - operations management
  - generative AI
  - service operations
  - platform operations
  - empirical operations management
---

::: {.home-page}

::: {.content-band}
<div class="eyebrow">Curriculum Vitae</div>

# CV

::: {.hero-links}
[Download CV PDF](cv/Chuan_Zhu_CV_updated.pdf){.link-button .primary}
[Research](research.qmd){.link-button}
[Industry](industry.qmd){.link-button}
[Teaching & Service](teaching-service.qmd){.link-button}
:::

:::

::: {.content-band}
## Academic Profile

- **Name:** Chuan Zhu
- **Position:** Ph.D. Candidate
- **Affiliation:** School of Management, Fudan University
- **Location:** Shanghai, China
- **Email:** [zhuc21@m.fudan.edu.cn](mailto:zhuc21@m.fudan.edu.cn)
- **ORCID:** [0009-0006-7660-3598](https://orcid.org/0009-0006-7660-3598)
- **LinkedIn:** [Chuan Zhu](https://www.linkedin.com/in/chuan-zhu-86692a169/)
- **SSRN:** [Author page](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=11527448)
- **Last updated:** 2026-5-15
:::

::: {.content-band}
## Education

::: {.paper-list}
::: {.paper-entry}
### Ph.D. in Business Artificial Intelligence

School of Management, Fudan University, expected 2027.

Dissertation focus: Integrating AI in Service Operations.
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
### B.S. in Logistics Engineering

Northeast Forestry University, 2018.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-band}
## Research Interests

::: {.stream-grid}
::: {.stream-card}
### Fields

Service operations; platform operations; empirical operations management.
:::

::: {.stream-card}
### Topics

AI-enabled service operations; human-AI collaboration; human-in-the-loop systems; GenAI and AI agents in platform operations; workforce management.
:::

::: {.stream-card}
### Methods

Field experiments; causal inference; machine learning; LLM-based measurement.
:::

::: {.stream-card}
### Empirical Settings

Customer service and contact-center operations; digital platforms and online marketplaces; AI-enabled service operations.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-band}
## Research Output

### Working Papers

::: {.paper-list}
::: {.paper-entry}
<div class="paper-meta">Job Market Paper | Under review at <em>Operations Research</em></div>

#### Agentic AI and Human-in-the-Loop Interventions: Field Experimental Evidence from Alibaba's Customer Service Operations

Yiwei Wang, **Chuan Zhu**, Tianjun Feng, Lauren Xiaoyuan Lu, and Bingxin Jia.

::: {.paper-links}
[SSRN author page](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=11527448)
[arXiv abstract](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14830)
[Paper PDF](<papers/Agentic AI and Human-in-the-Loop Interventions_2026-0511_corrected-original.pdf>)
:::
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
<div class="paper-meta">Working paper</div>

#### Managing Front-office and Back-office Effort Allocation: Unpacking the Effects of Workload on Service Performance

**Chuan Zhu**, Tom Fangyun Tan, and Tianjun Feng.

::: {.paper-links}
[Paper PDF](<papers/Visible Interaction, Invisible Resolution Workload and Effort Allocation in Online Customer Service.pdf>)
:::
:::
:::

### Conference Presentations

- **Agentic AI and Human-in-the-Loop Interventions: Field Experimental Evidence from Alibaba's Customer Service Operations.** POMS Annual Meeting, 2026.
- **Managing Front-office and Back-office Effort Allocation: Unpacking the Effects of Workload on Service Performance.** POMS-HK, 2026.
:::

::: {.content-band}
## Professional Experience

::: {.paper-list}
::: {.paper-entry}
### Alibaba Group

Research Scientist, Customer Operations Department, July 2022 to present. Full-time, onsite academic collaboration in Hangzhou, China.
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
### Environmental Defense Fund Climate Corps and LONGi Green Energy

Climate Corps Fellow, July 2021 to Oct. 2021. Full-time, onsite internship in Xi'an, China.
:::
:::

[View industry experience](industry.qmd){.link-button}
:::

::: {.content-band}
## Teaching, Service, Honors, and Skills

### Teaching

Teaching Assistant for Operations Management, Data-Driven Market Analysis, Microeconomics, and Theories and Practices of Entrepreneurship.

### Honors, Fellowships, and Awards

- Climate Corps Fellow, Environmental Defense Fund, 2021.
- Outstanding Academic Scholarship, School of Management, Fudan University, 2019.

### Skills

- **GenAI / LLM:** Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Agentic AI, LLM Fine-Tuning, Data Annotation and Evaluation.
- **Programming:** Python, R, Stata, SQL.
- **Software:** MATLAB, LaTeX.

[View teaching and service](teaching-service.qmd){.link-button}
:::

:::
